games.id: 1v1-lol
games.name: 1v1 .lol
games.category: Action, Multiplayer
games.author: JustPlay.LOL
games.description: 1v1.LOL is a fast, competitive third‑person shooter where players build structures and battle in 1v1 duels, box fights, and mini battle‑royale modes. It mixes Fortnite‑style building with quick matchmaking and skill‑based gunplay.

games.category: Puzzle
games.author: Gabriele Cirulli
games.description: 2048 is a sliding‑tile number puzzle where you combine matching tiles to reach the 2048 block. It’s simple to learn but surprisingly strategic, requiring planning, pattern recognition, and careful movement choices.

games.id: adventure-capitalist
games.name: Adventure Capitalist
games.category: Strategy, Other
games.author: Hyper Hippo Games
games.description: Adventure Capitalist is an idle business simulator where you invest in increasingly profitable ventures to grow your empire automatically. Progression is exponential, with upgrades, managers, and even entire planets to unlock as your wealth skyrockets.

games.id: among-us
games.name: Among Us
games.category: Action, Multiplayer, Other
games.author: Fan Made / Unknown
games.description: This fan‑made version of Among Us recreates the core gameplay of completing tasks, identifying impostors, and surviving meetings in a simplified browser format. It keeps the social‑deduction feel while offering lightweight, fast matches without downloads.

games.id: backrooms
games.name: Backrooms
games.category: Adventure, Other
games.author: Fan‑Made / Unknown
games.description: This fan‑made Backrooms game drops you into the endless yellow maze of Level 0, where you explore liminal hallways, avoid entities, and search for exits. It focuses on atmosphere, tension, and the unsettling feeling of being trapped in an infinite, empty space.

games.id: bacon-may-die
games.name: Bacon May Die
games.category: Arcade, Action, Other
games.author: SnoutUp Games
games.description: Bacon May Die is a frantic 2D fighting and shooting game where you play as a heavily armed pig battling waves of goofy enemies like zombie bunnies, skeletons, and explosive dogs. You unlock weapons, outfits, and even co‑op play while smashing through increasingly intense levels.

games.id: baldis-basics
games.name: Baldi's Basics
games.category: Adventure, Puzzle, Other
games.author: Fan‑Made / Unknown
games.description: This fan‑made Baldi’s Basics game recreates the classic notebook‑collecting, school‑escape formula with new maps, characters, or twists depending on the creator. It keeps the surreal edutainment‑horror vibe while offering fresh challenges and custom mechanics.

games.id: baseball-bros
games.name: Baseball Bros
games.category: Sports, Arcade, Other
games.author: Unknown
games.description: Baseball Bros is a fast‑paced arcade baseball game where you swing at incoming pitches, hit for distance, and rack up points while avoiding obstacles and fielders. The gameplay focuses on timing, power‑ups, and chaining perfect hits to reach massive scores.

games.id: basket-random
games.name: Basket Random
games.category: Arcade, Sports, Multiplayer
games.author: RHM Interactive
games.description: Basket Random is a goofy physics‑driven basketball game where each round changes the court, gravity, and character movement. You jump, flip, and collide your way to score points in unpredictable, hilarious matches.
